summary: sensors: normalize per-device temperatures to °C using tempunit and rename the output column to TEMP_C / temperature_c so the sibling sensors and rooms commands display on the same scale.
reason: rooms.go was fixed in the prior patch but the whole-house sensors snapshot still showed raw temperature values — a device reporting 72 °F and one reporting 22 °C appeared in the same TEMP column with no unit annotation. Same tempunit guard (convert when tempunit==1) and same column-naming convention now apply, keeping the two commands consistent.
